_meta.purpose: Expansion pack extracted from expansion_research.md; merged by load_seed.py with normalization + dedup.

tags.note: FDA max-dose limit 40mg; CredibleMeds known risk
levels fall with smoking; cut dose ~30-40% on cessation
FDA label: backup/non-oral contraception 4 wks after init & each dose escalation
highest VTE risk among oral estrogens
CONTRAINDICATED with strong CYP1A2 inhibitors (fluvoxamine, ciprofloxacin)
glycyrrhizin only; DGL is deglycyrrhizinated and lacks this

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Additive serotonergic effect → serotonin syndrome risk
interaction_pairs.source_name: NCCIH Herb-Drug Interactions; Maldonado-Puebla et al. Eur Psychiatry 2025
interaction_pairs.management_text: Avoid St. John's Wort with any SSRI/SNRI; serotonin syndrome risk. Applies to all serotonergic-tagged agents.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: CYP3A4 induction lowers ethinyl estradiol/progestin → contraceptive failure, breakthrough bleeding
interaction_pairs.source_name: Hall SD et al. Clin Pharmacol Ther 2003
interaction_pairs.management_text: Counsel to add a barrier method; St. John's Wort reduces contraceptive efficacy.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: CYP3A4 induction may lower exposure of CYP3A4-substrate hormones
interaction_pairs.management_text: St. John's Wort may reduce efficacy of CYP3A4-substrate hormone therapy (estradiol, testosterone).

interaction_pairs.mechanism: CBD inhibits CYP2C9/CYP3A4 → ↑ warfarin levels, ↑ INR/bleeding
interaction_pairs.source_name: Papakyriakopoulou et al. Br J Clin Pharmacol 2026; Patsalos Epilepsia 2020
interaction_pairs.management_text: Monitor INR closely; CBD can raise warfarin levels. Consider dose reduction.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: CBD CYP3A4 inhibition raises CYP3A4-substrate statin levels → myopathy risk
interaction_pairs.source_name: Papakyriakopoulou et al. Br J Clin Pharmacol 2026
interaction_pairs.management_text: Watch for statin side effects; CBD inhibits CYP3A4.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: CBD + valproate associated with hepatocellular enzyme elevations; CBD raises clobazam
interaction_pairs.management_text: Monitor LFTs when CBD combined with valproate; monitor for sedation with clobazam.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Both elevate cGMP → profound vasodilation/life-threatening hypotension
interaction_pairs.source_name: FDA Sildenafil label (DailyMed); Webb et al.
interaction_pairs.management_text: ABSOLUTE contraindication. No PDE5 inhibitor within 24h of any nitrate.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Additive hemodynamic effects from stacking vasoactive agents
interaction_pairs.source_name: Kernohan et al. Br J Clin Pharmacol 2005 (NMI 861)
interaction_pairs.management_text: Caution stacking ED drugs with vasoactive supplements; monitor BP.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Both enhance NO/vasodilation → additive hypotension
interaction_pairs.source_name: Kernohan et al. Br J Clin Pharmacol 2005
interaction_pairs.management_text: Monitor for dizziness/hypotension combining high-dose L-arginine with PDE5 inhibitors.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Duplicate HMG-CoA reductase inhibition (monacolin K = lovastatin) → myopathy/rhabdo risk
interaction_pairs.source_name: NCCIH Red Yeast Rice; Cohen Eur J Prev Cardiol 2017
interaction_pairs.management_text: Do not combine red yeast rice with a prescription statin — duplicate therapy.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: CYP1A2 inhibition ↑ tizanidine AUC 10x (cipro)/33x (fluvoxamine) → severe hypotension/bradycardia
interaction_pairs.management_text: Contraindicated with ciprofloxacin and fluvoxamine; caution with all CYP1A2 inhibitors.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Additive CNS/respiratory depression — FDA boxed warning
interaction_pairs.management_text: Avoid concomitant use; profound sedation, respiratory depression, coma, death possible.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Calcium forms insoluble complex → ↓ levothyroxine absorption
interaction_pairs.management_text: Separate by at least 4 hours.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Iron chelates levothyroxine → ~33% ↓ absorption
interaction_pairs.management_text: Separate by at least 4 hours.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Delayed gastric emptying alters oral drug absorption; oral semaglutide ↑ levothyroxine 33%
interaction_pairs.management_text: Monitor narrow-therapeutic-index oral drugs; increased clinical/lab monitoring.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Delayed gastric emptying reduces oral contraceptive efficacy
interaction_pairs.management_text: Switch to non-oral contraceptive or add barrier method for 4 weeks after initiation and each dose escalation.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Additive glucose lowering (AMPK) → hypoglycemia risk
interaction_pairs.management_text: Monitor blood glucose; berberine adds to glucose-lowering agents and GLP-1s.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Antiplatelet effect + anticoagulation → bleeding
interaction_pairs.management_text: Avoid ginkgo with warfarin; strong evidence of bleeding risk.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Vitamin K antagonizes warfarin → ↓ INR/efficacy
interaction_pairs.management_text: Keep vitamin K intake consistent; avoid new high-dose vitamin K supplements.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Sympathomimetic + MAO inhibition → hypertensive crisis
interaction_pairs.management_text: Absolute contraindication; applies to all stimulant-sympathomimetic-tagged agents incl. phentermine, yohimbine.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Serotonergic + MAO inhibition → serotonin syndrome
interaction_pairs.management_text: Absolute contraindication; 2-week washout required.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Additive sympathomimetic → ↑ HR/BP/arrhythmia
interaction_pairs.management_text: Avoid stacking stimulant pre-workout/yohimbine/synephrine with ADHD stimulants.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Synergistic clotting/VTE risk
interaction_pairs.source_name: Pomp et al.; smoking+HT case-control PMC4363922
interaction_pairs.management_text: Smoking sharply raises clot risk with estrogen, especially age >35.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: Additive hepatotoxicity + CNS depression
interaction_pairs.management_text: Do not combine kava with alcohol or other hepatotoxins/sedatives.

interaction_pairs.mechanism: CYP1A2 induction lowers olanzapine/clozapine; cessation raises levels ~1.5x
interaction_pairs.management_text: Levels rise on quitting; dose review needed on smoking-status change.

additive_rules.management_text: Stacking CNS depressants (opioids, benzodiazepines, muscle relaxants, sedating antihistamines, alcohol, high-dose melatonin/valerian/kava, THC, gabapentinoids) → additive sedation and respiratory depression. 2 agents = major; 3+ = contraindicated. Opioid+benzo carries an explicit FDA boxed warning.

Multiple QT-prolonging agents (antipsychotics esp. quetiapine/ziprasidone, citalopram/escitalopram, trazodone, vardenafil, some antibiotics) → additive Torsades risk. Dose-dependent; amplified by hypokalemia. ECG/electrolyte review at 2+ agents.
Stacking serotonergic agents (SSRIs, SNRIs, tramadol/tapentadol, cyclobenzaprine, St. John's Wort, 5-HTP, MAOIs) → serotonin syndrome. MAOI anchor escalates to contraindicated.
Glucose-lowering agents (insulin, sulfonylureas, metformin, GLP-1s) + hypoglycemic supplements (berberine, chromium) → hypoglycemia. Requires Rx diabetes-med anchor.
Stacking hepatotoxic agents (high-dose niacin, kava, green tea extract, high-dose vitamin A, valproate, alcohol) → additive liver injury.
Stacking stimulants (ADHD stimulants, phentermine, caffeine, synephrine, yohimbine, ginseng) → ↑ HR/BP, arrhythmia. MAOI anchor → contraindicated.
Anticoagulant/antiplatelet drugs + bleeding-risk supplements (ginkgo, high-dose fish oil, vitamin E >400 IU, garlic) → bleeding.

conditional_modifiers.message_text: Bupropion/Contrave and tramadol lower seizure threshold — elevate caution in seizure-prone users.
Smoking sharply increases clot risk with estrogen/COC/testosterone; counsel cessation, esp. age >35.
Hepatotoxic supplements (kava, green tea extract, high-dose niacin) riskier with pre-existing liver disease.
Pre-existing QT prolongation amplifies risk of QT-prolonging agents.
Stop high-dose biotin 2-3 days before blood tests; can cause falsely low troponin and distorted thyroid/hCG results.

survey_rules.rationale: Smoking induces CYP1A2, lowering CYP1A2-substrate levels; cessation raises them (clozapine ~1.5x in 2-4 wks).
Smoking synergistically raises VTE risk with hormones.
CBD inhibits CYP3A4/2C19/2C9 → raises substrate levels.
THC adds to CNS depressant sedation.
Alcohol adds CNS depression and hepatotoxicity; depletes B1/folate/B12.
GLP-1 delayed gastric emptying may affect oral drug/supplement absorption.
